settings.content: Plain single standalone paragraph. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog while a verbose narrator describes the entire scene in unnecessary detail.

Multi first para — tests the paragraph-to-paragraph spacing emitted by the prose utility rules.

Multi middle para — the gap between paragraphs should be consistent with the design-system rhythm.

Multi last para — closes the sequence.

List lead paragraph introducing the items below.

  • UL item one
  • UL item two with longer text that may wrap to a second line
  • UL item three
  1. OL step one
  2. OL step two
  3. OL step three
Emphasis paragraph carries italic emphasis here, bold weight here, and an inline link here to validate inline-element rendering inside prose.

Intro paragraph before the heading, so the h2 is not the block's first child.

Heading inside prose

Body paragraph after the heading — the nested h2 binds to its text_style via the bare-tag pattern and the prose rule sets its top margin.
Centered prose body — text_align center should set text-align center on the wrapper.
End-aligned prose body — text_align end should set text-align end on the wrapper.
Reading-width prose capped at the seeded reading content_width (680px / 42.5rem) — the readable column for long-form body copy.
Wide-width prose capped at the seeded wide content_width (1400px / 87.5rem).
Accent-colored prose — text_color accent emits --text-color and recolors the body.
Spacing override prose — 16px mobile / 64px desktop top margin, absolute (replaces the section rhythm).
